name: Hot Pink Happy Birthday Candle - Spritz™
description:
This Hot Pink Happy Birthday Candle from Spritz™ is a fun addition to the cake décor for any birthday party. This candle spells out 'Happy Birthday' in the color hot pink giving your cake a little personality. After the usage of this candle, it can easily be pulled out with the toothpick stand.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
